exercises.hindiScript: वे समय पर पहुँच सकते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Can you show me the way?

exercises.hindiScript: क्या मैं एक सवाल पूछ सकता हूँ?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.hindiScript: वह बहुत अच्छा गाना गा सकती है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.hindiScript: हम यह project पूरा कर सकते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.hindiScript: क्या तुम आज आ सकते हो?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.hindiScript: मैं इसे ठीक कर सकता हूँ।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They can find a solution to any problem.

exercises.hindiScript: वह किसी भी भाषा सीख सकता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I could not do this before.

exercises.hindiScript: क्या मैं यहाँ बैठ सकता हूँ?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Can you show me the way?

dictationPassage.text: They can arrive on time. Can I ask a question? She can sing very well. We can complete this project. Can you come today?
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: वे समय पर पहुँच सकते हैं। क्या मैं एक सवाल पूछ सकता हूँ? वह बहुत अच्छा गाना गा सकती है। हम यह project पूरा कर सकते हैं। क्या तुम आज आ सकते हो?
